Affordable Housing for Employees

Kadir Has University is a city university. Kadir Has Campus, located at the heart of Istanbul, encourages public transportation and prioritizes pedestrian access for all its employees and students. Kadir Has University provides employees with free public transportation cards, which allow employees to use all public transport vehicles in Istanbul, including buses, metro, metrobus, railways, and ferries.
